response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The lyrics provided in the reference JSON for 'ホントノワタシ' were completely different from the actual lyrics performed in the video; thus, they were discarded. The lyrics for '興味ないよ' were partially matching but needed adjustments. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed and translated both songs manually from the audio stream. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal cues of La+ Darknesss and Hakui Koyori, keeping silent gaps free of subtitles during instrumental sections.

subtitles.original: 私は何で好きなんだって問い出す性で
subtitles.english: With my nature of questioning why I love you,

subtitles.original: 最低だなって思ったあの子の方が良いんだもんね
subtitles.english: since that girl I thought was the worst is better, right?

subtitles.original: 私興味ないよ君なんて
subtitles.english: I have no interest in you at all.

subtitles.original: 中途半端な容れ物(イレ)で舐めた真似
subtitles.english: Making light of me with such a half-hearted vessel.

subtitles.original: 傲慢で稀重なこの愛に
subtitles.english: By this arrogant and precious love,

subtitles.original: 壊されないで愛
subtitles.english: don't let love be destroyed.

subtitles.original: 剥がされないで愛
subtitles.english: Don't let love be torn away.

subtitles.original: 止めどないよ君の愛を独り占めしたい
subtitles.english: It's endless, I want to monopolize your love.

subtitles.original: 毒だろうが何だろうが抱きしめてあげたい
subtitles.english: Whether it's poison or whatever, I want to embrace you.

subtitles.original: ライセンス契約 独占のフォーリンラブ
subtitles.english: A licensing agreement, an exclusive falling in love.

subtitles.original: 逃がさないずっと
subtitles.english: I'll never let you go, forever.

subtitles.original: 君が好きってこの感情に騙されてる
subtitles.english: I'm being deceived by this feeling of 'I love you.'

subtitles.original: 大事な方は君か私か決めかねてる
subtitles.english: I can't decide who is more important, you or me.

subtitles.original: 甘すぎる君へ
subtitles.english: To you, who are far too sweet.

subtitles.original: 私興味ないよ君なんて
subtitles.english: I have no interest in you at all.

subtitles.original: ほら振り回してよ好きなだけ
subtitles.english: Go on, lead me around as much as you like.

subtitles.original: 傲慢で稀重なこの愛は
subtitles.english: Because this arrogant and precious love,

subtitles.original: 渡さないから
subtitles.english: I won't hand it over.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿だよね 色ボケだね それ見たことかださださ
subtitles.english: You're a fool, love-blinded, serves you right, so uncool.

subtitles.original: もう他でもないあなたに呪われたまま
subtitles.english: Still being cursed by none other than you.

subtitles.original: いや興味ないよ君なんて
subtitles.english: No, I have no interest in you at all.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿なフリしてあげただけ
subtitles.english: I was only pretending to be a fool for you.

subtitles.original: 愛と愛をぶつけ合って ぐちゃぐちゃになって保存
subtitles.english: Let's crash our love against each other and become a jumbled mess.

subtitles.original: 私興味ないよ君なんて
subtitles.english: I have no interest in you at all.

subtitles.original: 中途半端な容れ物(イレ)で舐めた真似
subtitles.english: Making light of me with such a half-hearted vessel.

subtitles.original: 傲慢で稀重なこの愛に壊されないで
subtitles.english: Don't let yourself be destroyed by this arrogant and precious love.

subtitles.original: 剥がされないで愛保存
subtitles.english: Don't let love be torn away.

subtitles.original: 剥がされないで愛
subtitles.english: Don't let love be torn away.

subtitles.original: 見た目だけじゃ終わらない 私のこと可愛いと言ったけど
subtitles.english: It doesn't end with just looks; you called me cute, but...

subtitles.original: まさかそれだけと思っていないよね 私のホント知っていてほしい
subtitles.english: ...surely you don't think that's all there is to me? I want you to know the real me.

subtitles.original: 要領良くこなすのがアイデンティティ 不測の事態も動じない
subtitles.english: Doing things efficiently is my identity; I never flinch even in unforeseen events.

subtitles.original: おすましフェイスでいるけれど 心は常に青白く燃える
subtitles.english: Though I keep a composed face, my heart is always burning pale blue.

subtitles.original: 諦めはしない 媚びたりもしない 私負けない
subtitles.english: I won't give up, I won't flatter, and I won't lose.

subtitles.original: 扱いやすい奴だと思うな 甘く見ると痛い目見るぞ
subtitles.english: Don't think of me as someone easy to handle; underestimate me and you'll get hurt.

subtitles.original: それでも時には逃げ出してしまいたい
subtitles.english: Even so, sometimes I just want to run away.

subtitles.original: そんな衝動に襲われ吐き出す夜もある
subtitles.english: There are nights when I'm overcome by such urges and let it all out.

subtitles.original: ほんの小さな小さな妥協が 積み重なり重なって 動けない
subtitles.english: Just a tiny, tiny compromise piling up and up makes me unable to move.

subtitles.original: 大きな大きな可能性失くし 未来を狭めてしまうから
subtitles.english: Because it will lose huge, huge possibilities and narrow down my future.

subtitles.original: どんなに苦しくても 辛くても 後悔だけはしない
subtitles.english: No matter how painful or bitter, I will never regret.

subtitles.original: 生き方を見せたいんじゃなくて 生き方なんだ
subtitles.english: It's not that I want to show off my way of life, it is my way of life.

subtitles.original: 現実と理想との距離を縮められなかったとしても
subtitles.english: Even if I couldn't shorten the distance between reality and my ideals,

subtitles.original: おすましフェイスでいるだけ 何事も無かったかのように
subtitles.english: I'll just keep a composed face, as if nothing happened.

subtitles.original: 立ち止まりはしない 後戻りもしない 夢も捨てない
subtitles.english: I won't stop, I won't go back, and I won't throw away my dreams.

subtitles.original: 私らしく 私らしく
subtitles.english: In my own way, in my own way.
